name: czrecoilframe_init_startup_hw_api_from_options
description: CZRecoilFrame::InitStartupHwApiFromOptions initializes the startup hardware API path from persisted options and available DirectDraw devices, falling back when needed.
known_limits: The smoke verifies a valid hardware option path and a fallback software path with persisted option and frame state side effects.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for exact branch/member-call shape.
